examples: Xylitol can help kill off, or starve the bacteria living on our teeth.
Xylitol also appears to have potential as a treatment for osteoporosis.
Because of its distinctive structure, bacteria cannot utilize Xylitol for energy.
Finnish scientists found that children chewing Xylitol and Sorbitol gum suffered 40% fewer ear infections than non-chewers.
Lotte last month launched Xylitol Helco gum in South Korea to fight the bacteria causing stomach ulcers.
